blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,842 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
